Registry / Terms / principal meridians

principal meridians

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #01129 · 2 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 2 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

2 distinct definitions across 2 publications.

2 unique definitions (each used by only one publication)

Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Definition
202X1999OIML R 93:19993.601129
perpendicular sections of a lens containing the optical axis and having maximum and minimum refractive powers
pending
20101999OIML R 93:19993.601129
perpendicular sections of a lens containing the optical axis and In general, the two principal meridians are having maximum and minimum refractive powers
